label: sandbox_diagnostics • stray leading quote surfaces unbalanced-quote hint
notes: Reproduces the observed failure where the model wrapped the whole command in a stray leading single quote (`'curl -s "…"`), so bash read to end-of-input looking for the closing `'` and reported `unexpected EOF while looking for matching '`. The self-heal hint must flag the unbalanced quote.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr: bash: -c: line 1: unexpected EOF while looking for matching `''
